Imports

codes, constants, types, functions, protocols, extras

Types

MetalContext = object
  window*: Window
  device*: MTLDevice
  commandQueue*: MTLCommandQueue
  view*: NSView
  layer*: CAMetalLayer
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc clearPass(ctx: var MetalContext; drawable: CAMetalDrawable;
               clear: MTLClearColor): MTLRenderPassDescriptor {....raises: [],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates a clear pass descriptor for the current drawable. Source   Edit   
proc currentDrawable(ctx: var MetalContext): CAMetalDrawable {....raises: [],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Returns the current drawable after syncing the drawable size. Source   Edit   
proc init(ctx: var MetalContext; window: Window; device = 0.MTLDevice;
          pixelFormat: MTLPixelFormat = 80'u) {....raises: [Metal4Error],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Initializes a Metal 4 context for a Windy window. Source   Edit   
proc newCommandBuffer(ctx: MetalContext): MTLCommandBuffer {.
    ...raises: [Metal4Error], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates a command buffer from the context queue. Source   Edit   
proc newMetalContext(window: Window; device = 0.MTLDevice;
                     pixelFormat: MTLPixelFormat = 80'u): MetalContext {.
    ...raises: [Metal4Error], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Creates a Metal 4 context for a Windy window. Source   Edit   
proc updateDrawableSize(ctx: var MetalContext) {....raises: [], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Keeps the Metal drawable size in sync with the Windy window. Source   Edit
